repos.name: apache/ossie
repos.description: Apache Ossie, industry wide specification effort to standardize how we exchange semantic metadata across analytics, AI and BI platforms, providing a vendor neutral, single source of truth for semantic data
repos.descriptionZh: Apache Ossie，行业范围内的规范工作，旨在标准化我们在分析、AI 和 BI 平台之间交换语义元数据的方式，为语义数据提供供应商中立的单一事实来源

repos.name: Nutlope/hallmark
repos.description: Anti-AI-slop design skill for Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex.
repos.descriptionZh: Claude Code、Cursor、Codex 的防 AI 设计技巧。

repos.name: OpenCut-app/OpenCut
repos.descriptionZh: 开源 CapCut 替代方案

repos.name: PostHog/posthog
repos.description: 🦔 PostHog is the leading platform for building self-driving products. Our developer tools – AI observability, analytics, session replay, flags, experiments, error tracking, logs, and more – capture all the context agents need to diagnose problems, uncover opportunities, and ship fixes. Steer it all from Slack, web, desktop, or the MCP.
repos.descriptionZh: 🦔 PostHog 是构建自动驾驶产品的领先平台。我们的开发人员工具——人工智能可观察性、分析、会话重放、标记、实验、错误跟踪、日志等——捕获代理诊断问题、发现机会和发布修复所需的所有上下文。从 Slack、Web、桌面或 MCP 掌控一切。

repos.name: openinterpreter/openinterpreter
repos.description: A Codex-compatible coding agent for open models like Kimi K3
repos.descriptionZh: 适用于 Kimi K3 等开放模型的 Codex 兼容编码代理

repos.name: hasaneyldrm/exercises-dataset
repos.description: 1,324-exercise fitness dataset — animation GIFs, 180×180 thumbnails, muscle-group & equipment data, and step-by-step instructions in 6 languages. The exercise data layer behind the LogPress app.
repos.descriptionZh: 1,324 项运动健身数据集 — 动画 GIF、180×180 缩略图、肌肉群和设备数据以及 6 种语言的分步说明。 LogPress 应用程序背后的锻炼数据层。

repos.name: Shubhamsaboo/awesome-llm-apps
repos.description: 100+ AI Agent & RAG apps you can actually run — clone, customize, ship.
repos.descriptionZh: 您可以实际运行 100 多个 AI Agent 和 RAG 应用程序 — 克隆、自定义、发布。

repos.name: lobehub/lobehub
repos.description: 🤯 LobeHub is your Chief Agent Operator, organizing your agents into 7×24 operations by hiring, scheduling, and reporting on your entire AI team.
repos.descriptionZh: 🤯 LobeHub 是您的首席代理运营商，通过招聘、调度和报告整个 AI 团队，将您的代理组织为 7×24 小时运营。

repos.descriptionZh: 真正工程师的技能。直接来自我的 .claude 目录。

repos.name: github/copilot-sdk
repos.description: Multi-platform SDK for integrating GitHub Copilot Agent into apps and services
repos.descriptionZh: 用于将 GitHub Copilot Agent 集成到应用程序和服务中的多平台 SDK

repos.name: Graphify-Labs/graphify
repos.description: AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more). Turn any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, shell scripts, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. App code + database schema + infrastructure in one graph.
repos.descriptionZh: AI 编码助手技能（Claude Code、Codex、OpenCode、Cursor、Gemini CLI 等）。将任何代码、SQL 架构、R 脚本、shell 脚本、文档、论文、图像或视频文件夹转换为可查询的知识图谱。一张图中的应用程序代码+数据库架构+基础设施。

repos.name: codecrafters-io/build-your-own-x
repos.description: Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.
repos.descriptionZh: 通过从头开始重新创建您最喜欢的技术来掌握编程。
